candidate_definition_hints.text: This sample has the full End2End process of creating RAG application with Prompty and Azure AI Foundry. It includes GPT-4 LLM application code, evaluations, deployment automation with AZD CLI, GitHub actions for evaluation and deployment and intent mapping for multiple LLM task mapping.

source_repo_description: This sample has the full End2End process of creating RAG application with Prompty and Azure AI Foundry. It includes GPT-4 LLM application code, evaluations, deployment automation with AZD CLI, GitHub actions for evaluation and deployment and intent mapping for multiple LLM task mapping.
